docs.title: RWA Creator
docs.text:
Manual

RWA Creator, the Desktop Application for Real World Audio (RWA), is used to create interactive binaural sounwalks.

docs.title: RWA iOS Client
docs.text:
Manual

Soundwalks created in RWA Creator are used withing the RWA Client App for iOS. The iOS devices running the app is used with custom headphones, featuring RTK-GNSS positioning and headtracking.
